description_long: This is a robust blue pickup truck with a double cab and four large, rugged tires designed for off-road and urban environments. The body is primarily painted in a glossy blue finish, with black-tinted windows and a metallic silver front grille and bumper. The truck features a spacious open cargo bed at the rear, suitable for transporting goods or equipment. The side mirrors and a prominent vertical exhaust pipe are visible, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The wheels have detailed silver rims and thick, treaded tires for enhanced traction. The overall design suggests a modern, heavy-duty pickup, likely inspired by popular American brands.
description: A modern blue double-cab pickup truck with large rugged tires, a silver grille, and an open cargo bed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold silver grille, black-tinted windshield, and wide stance of the truck.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the double cab, two doors, large tires, and the open cargo bed with a visible exhaust pipe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, rear lights, and the vertical exhaust pipe on the right side.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the double cab, two doors, and the open cargo bed.
